sessions.intent: Create coder handoff spec for terminology consistency fix: actions/ → modules/, IClass → IAction

before.assumptions: Web Claude doc has the right intent but may have stale interface signatures. Need to verify actual codebase state.
before.risk: Medium — wide rename across ~130 files, but purely mechanical. Namespace collision with existing IAction entity interface needs handling.

sessions.plan: Delete stale entity IAction, git mv actions/ → modules/, rename IClass → IAction, update Library internals (handler → action), update source generator namespace strings, update 25 test files

actions.context: Verified actual codebase state vs Web Claude doc. Found IAction naming collision — entity IAction is dead code, safe to delete first. Action entity already has correct Module/ActionName properties. No BaseClass exists. Handoff spec reflects real code.

after.health: Branch created, plan written. Ready for coder handoff.
after.notes: Mechanical rename task. ~130 files affected but pattern is simple find-and-replace. Main risk is the source generator namespace strings — those are string literals that must match exactly.

sessions.intent: Assess whether scaffolding is needed for terminology rename task

before.assumptions: Rename task may need type skeletons or failing tests

sessions.plan: No scaffolding needed. Pure mechanical rename with no new types or tests.

actions.context: Verified build is clean (0 errors). No new types or tests to scaffold. Handed off directly to coder.

after.health: Ready for coder. No scaffolding artifacts — coder works from architect plan directly.
after.notes: Flagged two risks for coder: GetCodeGenerated tuple rename (Handler → Action) is breaking at call sites, and HandlerError → ActionError affects test assertions.

sessions.intent: Execute terminology rename: actions/ → modules/, IClass → IAction, Library internals handler → action

before.assumptions: Architect plan is verified against real codebase. Scaffolder confirmed no new types needed. ~130 files affected.
before.risk: Medium — wide rename but mechanical. Source generator string literals and tuple field rename are the main risks.

sessions.plan: Follow architect's 9-step execution order. Delete stale IAction, git mv, namespace replace, IClass → IAction, Library internals, source generator, tests, build, run tests.

actions.context: Mechanical rename: actions/ → modules/, IClass → IAction, handler → action in Library internals, HandlerError → ActionError. ~140 files total.

after.status: Complete. All renames done. 1423 tests pass.
after.notes: Zero remaining references to IClass, PLang.Runtime2.actions, or HandlerError in production/test/generator code.

sessions.intent: Higher-level cross-concern analysis of terminology rename completeness

before.assumptions: Coder claims zero remaining stale references. Need independent verification across all rename surfaces.
before.risk: Low — rename is mechanical, but string literals and test data are easy to miss

sessions.plan: Verify all 6 rename surfaces independently: namespace, interface, field, tuple, error key, source generator. Apply cross-branch learnings.

actions.context: Independent verification of rename completeness. Found 1 stale test reference the coder missed.

after.notes: Finding #1: ErrorInfoTests.cs:198,204 still uses 'HandlerError' as test data. Minor — test passes, but stale terminology. Finding #2: .bot/ scaffolder skeletons from runtime2-settings have stale namespace — non-blocking, will be stale after rebase.

sessions.intent: Verify terminology rename test quality and completeness

before.assumptions: Coder reports 1423/1423 C# pass. Code analyzer found 1 minor straggler (fixed). Need independent test run and rename completeness verification.
before.risk: Low — mechanical rename, tests should pass identically.

sessions.plan: Run full C# and PLang test suites. Grep for all 6 stale reference patterns. Verify test assertions match production error keys. Check for false greens from tuple rename.

actions.context: Independent verification: 1423/1423 C# pass, 17/18 PLang pass (1 unrelated). All 6 rename surfaces clean. Test assertions correctly check ActionError. Approved.

after.health: green — 1423/1423 C# pass, rename verified complete
after.notes: Approved for auditor. One PLang test (Settings/SetMaxGzipSize) fails due to missing .pr file — needs a build, not related to rename.
